offer: For construction finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate payment requests cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile subcontractor payment requests against contracts instead of manual reconciliation of payment requests against contracts.
problem: Inaccurate payment requests leading to disputes and delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction finance help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction finance teams with demo video
Join community forums where finance teams share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of payment requests on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing payment data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
